ENGNew: Dance in the Palm of My Hand
changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Dancing in the Palm of My Hand"

TextENGNew: ``...So, what are you going to do?@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3040. Leave it alone? Dispose of it?@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3041. Well, if I was in your position, I think it would be best to clean it up quickly.``

``The thing about the police... if you kill anyone even tangentially related to them, they'll relentlessly pursue you.@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3003. But if you'd like to run off alone and become a scapegoat, I won't stop you.``
``Be serious.@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3043. I have a reckless detective's life and my own precious future to worry about. It's not worth it.``
He had a bitter expression on his face, but his tone was light.
Even if left alone, it wasn't a major threat.
``Anyway, I am a little surprised.@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3045. I thought your way of doing things was to weed out anyone who seemed remotely connected.``
``You killed an innocent girl without feeling any weight on your conscience, but now you're turning to humanitarianism?``

``Hehe... You're one to talk.@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3005. It's not like I took pity on that detective.@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3006. I simply figured this could potentially lead to an interesting experiment.``

``Yeah.@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3008. It seems that girl will reach the terminal phase before long.@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3009. But she's keeping calm despite her condition...@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3010. If things go well, this may lead to new clinical data.``

``I see. A guinea pig, eh...?@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3049. Then let me take back my earlier claim about you being a humanitarian.@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3050. You're truly a monster.@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3051. At the very least, you're not human.``
``Hehe, thank you.@k@vS20/09/VTT_takano3012. That's the highest form of praise.``
``Alright, I'll report this to our undercover contacts.@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3053. If that's all right?``
``This is all like a play. Everyone is dancing in the palm of my hand... huh?@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3055. Well, that's fine I suppose.``
``I'll show you which of us shall emerge a god.@k@vS20/32/VTT_hanada3057. Aahahahahahahaha...``
